auto_filled._comment: Filled by tools/extract.ts (site) and tools/enrich-adv.ts (SEC IAPD). Don't edit by hand. NOTE: Starke is a Pasadena, CA marketing agency, NOT a financial firm. The pipeline's enrich-adv returned a FALSE POSITIVE matching 'Starke' against 'STARKEY & ASSOCIATES, INC.' (CRD 116023, Evergreen CO) via the same pickBestMatch token-prefix-fuzz weakness that hit Asset Map ('Asset Map' → 'Sugar Maple Asset Management') and Streamline Planning ('Streamline' → unrelated NY DBA umbrella). This is the THIRD false-positive of this type. The bogus IAPD block is cleared below; the cached ADV PDF was deleted. Bug to fix: pickBestMatch should require exact whole-word token equality (case-insensitive) before declaring a confident match, OR require that all query tokens appear as whole words inside a single name string.

sec_iapd.note: Starke is a marketing agency, not an RIA. The pipeline's auto-match returned a false-positive against 'STARKEY & ASSOCIATES, INC.' — manually cleared 2026-05-13.

manual._comment: Needs Form ADV Part 1A (deeper fields) or Part 2A (brochure). Pull from the adv_pdf_url above or from the IAPD profile page.
